zh.lifeSummary: 當lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March於1374年4月11日出生在威爾士蒙姆爾武斯可時，他的父親Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March22歲，母親Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster18歲。他於1388年10月7日與Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1398年7月20日在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯凱爾斯享年24歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March于1374年4月11日出生在威尔士蒙姆爾武斯可时，他的父亲Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March22岁，母亲Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster18岁。他于1388年10月7日与Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1398年7月20日在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯凱爾斯享年24岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾維格莫。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March was born on 11 April 1374, in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March, was 22 and his mother, Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, was 18. He married Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton on 7 October 1388. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 20 July 1398, in Kells, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 24, and was buried in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.Usk, monmouthshire, Kingdom of Wales: Usk, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March est né le 11 avril 1374, à Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton le 7 octobre 1388. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1398, à Kells, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterré à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March am 11. April 1374 in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March 22 und seine Mutter Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster 18. Er hat am 7. Oktober 1388 Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Juli 1398 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Kells, County Meath, Irland und wurde in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March è nato il il 11 aprile 1374 nel Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton il 7 ottobre 1388. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1398, nel Kells, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolto a Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of Marchが1374年4月11日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスクで生まれた時，父Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of Marchは22歳，母Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulsterは18歳であった。1388年10月7日にLady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness cheretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1398年7月20日にアイルランドコウントイ メアスケルズで24歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March(이)가 1374년 4월 11일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1388년 10월 7일 Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 7월 20일 아일랜드 카운티 미스 켈스에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에 묻혔다.

pt.11 April 1374–20 July 1398: 11 de abril de 1374–20 de julho de 1398
pt.lifeSummary: Quando lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March nasceu em 11 de abril de 1374, em Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton em 7 de outubro de 1388. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1398, em Kells, County Meath, Irlanda, com 24 anos, e foi sepultado em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March родился 11 апреля 1374 г. в местности уск, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton 7 октября 1388 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 20 июля 1398 г. в местности келлс, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 24 лет и был похоронен в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.11 April 1374–20 July 1398: 11 de abril de 1374–20 de julio de 1398
es.lifeSummary: Cuando lord sir Roger Mortimer 4th Earl Of March nació el 11 de abril de 1374, en Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton el 7 de octubre de 1388. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1398, en Kells, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 24 años, y fue sepultado en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
